description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Istio service mesh, tracking traffic, performance, errors, resource usage, control plane, data plane, and security metrics.
title: Istio Monitoring Dashboard

2b8aba66-89a4-4786-ab62-b38db96f6b2e.description: Kubernetes namespace where Istio is deployed
2b8aba66-89a4-4786-ab62-b38db96f6b2e.name: namespace
2b8aba66-89a4-4786-ab62-b38db96f6b2e.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'

48be5c1f-ca1e-47c7-8e3f-51d528ab3a95.name: deployment_environment
48be5c1f-ca1e-47c7-8e3f-51d528ab3a95.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment_environment') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name LIKE 'istio%'

a53e5c32-a7ac-4235-bdab-e8647f876c84.description: Destination service name within the mesh
a53e5c32-a7ac-4235-bdab-e8647f876c84.name: service_name
a53e5c32-a7ac-4235-bdab-e8647f876c84.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service_name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'

c6bd45ef-c32c-4934-bcf1-eb2691345dad.name: cluster
c6bd45ef-c32c-4934-bcf1-eb2691345dad.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s_cluster_name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name LIKE 'istio%'

widgets.description: High-level metrics providing an overview of Istio's health and performance
widgets.title: General Overview

widgets.description: Total number of requests processed by the service mesh
widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Rate of incoming and outgoing requests per second
widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: Average latency of requests within the mesh
widgets.title: Average Latency

widgets.description: Percentage of failed requests (5xx) compared to total requests
widgets.title: Error Rate

widgets.description: Metrics related to traffic routing, load balancing, and service discovery within Istio
widgets.title: Traffic Management

widgets.description: Distribution of requests across different destination services
widgets.title: Request Distribution

widgets.description: Request distribution across destination workloads
widgets.title: Load Balancing Efficiency

widgets.description: Number of circuit breaker events triggered
widgets.title: Circuit Breaker Events

widgets.description: Retry attempts and timeout occurrences in request handling
widgets.title: Retries and Timeouts

widgets.description: Metrics related to the performance and responsiveness of services within Istio
widgets.title: Performance Metrics

widgets.description: 50th percentile request latency
widgets.title: Request Latency P50

widgets.description: 95th and 99th percentile request latency
widgets.title: Request Latency P95 / P99

widgets.description: Requests processed per second by service
widgets.title: Throughput

widgets.description: Response times of individual services
widgets.title: Service Response Times

widgets.description: Metrics related to errors and failures within the Istio service mesh
widgets.title: Error Metrics

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP errors (4xx, 5xx) across services
widgets.title: HTTP Error Rates

widgets.description: Rate of gRPC errors in service communications
widgets.title: gRPC Error Rates

widgets.description: Number of failed requests (5xx) attributed to each service
widgets.title: Failed Requests by Service

widgets.description: Number of TLS handshake failures
widgets.title: TLS Handshake Failures

widgets.description: Metrics related to the resource consumption of Istio components
widgets.title: Resource Usage

widgets.description: CPU usage for Istio control plane and data plane components
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Memory consumption of Istio components
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Active TCP connections across the mesh
widgets.title: TCP Connections

widgets.description: Metrics related to the Istio control plane operations
widgets.title: Control Plane Metrics

widgets.description: Configuration synchronizations performed by Pilot (istiod)
widgets.title: Pilot xDS Pushes

widgets.description: Time taken for proxy configuration to converge
widgets.title: Pilot Proxy Convergence Time

widgets.description: Number of connected xDS endpoints
widgets.title: Pilot Connected Endpoints

widgets.description: Certificates issued by Citadel/istiod for mTLS
widgets.title: Citadel Certificate Issuance

widgets.description: Metrics related to the Istio data plane (Envoy sidecar proxies)
widgets.title: Data Plane Metrics

widgets.description: Active upstream connections in Envoy proxies
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Volume of inbound and outbound traffic through proxies
widgets.title: Inbound vs Outbound Traffic

widgets.description: Response bytes through Envoy proxies by service
widgets.title: Proxy Response Size

widgets.description: Connection errors encountered by data plane proxies
widgets.title: Connection Errors

widgets.description: Metrics related to security features and policies enforced by Istio
widgets.title: Security Metrics

widgets.description: Connections secured with mutual TLS vs plaintext
widgets.title: Mutual TLS Usage

widgets.description: Allowed and denied requests by authorization policy
widgets.title: Authorization Policy Enforcement

widgets.description: CSR requests and certificate issuance counts
widgets.title: Certificate Expirations

widgets.description: Requests denied due to security policies (4xx/403)
widgets.title: Security Policy Violations
